steps.title: Identify what the finding suggests about lobbying
steps.content: The passage states lobbying does little to alter the probability of policies being enacted. This finding portrays lobbying as lacking effect or impact.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content:
Ineffectual means failing to produce desired results—a quality directly contradicted by the evidence that lobbying shapes policy proposals.

So lobbying isn't as ineffectual as the finding suggests. Counterproductive overstates the criticism; cynical and biased don't apply.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
